description: Top 50 out of 18,000+ participants at the Hack2Skill × Google Cloud APAC Hackathon. Built MeetIQ — an Agentic Meeting Intelligence system — and won $1,100 in GCP credits.
3rd place out of 80+ teams at the Microsoft × Tech Mahindra Ideathon for our Agentic RAG system design for telecom automation.
6th place solo at the Microsoft Agentic AI Hackathon, building an automated RFP analysis agent.
Crossed 500+ problems on LeetCode, focusing heavily on Dynamic Programming, Graphs, Backtracking, and Sliding Window techniques.
Received the Highest Performance Rating for two consecutive years at Tech Mahindra for outstanding technical contributions in GenAI and telecom automation delivery.

Awarded in recognition of impactful contributions, ownership, and a proactive approach toward solving challenges. Demonstrated strong initiative and a results-driven mindset, contributing to team success and driving meaningful outcomes within the organization.
